name: Visteon Corporation
description: Visteon Corporation is a global technology company that designs, engineers, and manufactures innovative cockpit electronics products for the automotive industry. Headquartered in Van Buren Township, Michigan, the company specializes in digital instrument clusters, information displays, infotainment systems, and connected car solutions. Visteon focuses on delivering advanced user experiences and high-performance electronics to major vehicle manufacturers worldwide. By leveraging its expertise in hardware and software integration, Visteon plays a critical role in the digital transformation of the modern vehicle, enhancing safety, connectivity, and the overall driving experience for consumers across global automotive markets.
